creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
A new port emulators/linux_base-f8 is based on an old one (emulators/linux_base-f7).
	So a repocopy is needed.

Fix: 

Please, do a repocopy emulators/linux_base-f7 -> emulators/linux_base-f8
	and then assign the PR to me.
	I'm a maintainer of emulators/linux_base-f7 and I approve the repocopy.
	Thanks!
